summary: Frontend-only verification of iteration 11 incremental work: (1) Bangla+English language toggle on all 3 demo apps (BondoBD/NewsNow/QuizBD), (2) Web Builder template reorder + QuizBD as new web template, (3) Rich Bangla CSS mini-previews in template cards. ALL 14 targeted checks PASSED. No regression from iteration 10.

issues: Carry-over from iter 10: api.fontshare.com CORS-blocked for Cabinet Grotesk font — falls back to system fonts, cosmetic only

verified_working: Web App Builder tab (/digital → Web App Builder): First 3 cards in exact spec order — template-card-web-bondobd → template-card-web-newsnow → template-card-web-quizbd. Ratings 4.9 / 4.8 / 4.7 all rendered.

Rich Bangla CSS mini-previews confirmed in all 3 cards (NOT plain gradient). Bangla character counts: BondoBD=97 chars (পরিবার-কেন্দ্রিক, বাংলাদেশের, ম্যাট্রিমনি, +88 01XX, ৪ টাকা/দিন +VAT), NewsNow=135 chars (আ logo, আলোকবার্তা, ● ৬৪ জেলার আপডেট, স্বাগতম, দেশ-বিদেশের সকল খবর, রাজনীতি/অর্থনীতি/খেলাধুলা), QuizBD=39 chars (বাংলাদেশের জাতীয় ফুল? + শাপলা/গোলাপ/পদ্ম/অর্কিড options + leaderboard).
QuizBD web template card is clickable (template-card-web-quizbd) — confirmed via Playwright click action.

BondoBD /apps/bondobd: Default Bangla landing renders 'বাংলাদেশের সবচেয়ে বড় ম্যাট্রিমনি'. data-testid='lang-bn' and data-testid='lang-en' toggles both visible. Click EN → text switches to 'Bangladesh's Largest Matrimony'. Click বাংলা → switches back. Locale persists in localStorage key 'bdapps_locale_bondo' (verified value='bn').
NewsNow /apps/newsnow: Default Bangla landing shows 'আলোকবার্তা' + 'দেশ-বিদেশের সকল খবর'. EN toggle → 'Alokbarta' + 'All News In One Place'. Both confirmed.
QuizBD /apps/quizbd: Default Bangla shows 'প্রতিদিনের কুইজ — জ্ঞান যাচাই!' with Bangla numerals (১,৮৪,০০০+ subscribers, ৫০,০০০ taka). EN toggle → 'Daily Quiz — Test Your Knowledge!'.

QuizBD post-OTP home shows fully translated Bangla category cards: বাংলাদেশ সাধারণ জ্ঞান, ইসলাম ও ধর্ম, বিজ্ঞান ও প্রযুক্তি, খেলাধুলা, বিনোদন. Bangla leaderboard label লিডারবোর্ড, points label পয়েন্ট, streak label ধারা. Bangla CTA ৫ টাকা পুরস্কার নিন.
OTP flow no regression: phone 1711234567 + Send OTP → demo OTP visible → Verify → quiz home renders with 4 API calls registered on API Monitor badge (badge counter shows '4').
API Monitor toggle button visible bottom-right on all 3 demo apps (data-testid=api-monitor-toggle).
Other web templates (web-ecom, web-food, web-health, etc.) still render correctly after the reorder — no broken cards.
critical_code_review_comments: demoI18n.jsx is clean and tightly scoped (~280 lines). One minor: in LangToggle the inactive button uses `text-${color}` interpolated Tailwind class which is unsafe with JIT — works because callers pass 'white' (already in safelist by default). Consider explicit conditional classNames if other colors are ever passed.
STRINGS object is single source of truth — good. No business logic concerns.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 layered bilingual i18n on top of iteration 10's BDApps demo apps. The i18n hook lives at /app/frontend/src/services/demoI18n.jsx (useDemoLocale + LangToggle). Default locale is 'bn' for all 3 demo apps. localStorage keys: bdapps_locale_bondo, bdapps_locale_news, bdapps_locale_quiz. The Web template list (builderTemplates.js WEB_TEMPLATES) is sorted with web-bondobd→web-newsnow→web-quizbd first. Rich CSS mockups live in /app/frontend/src/components/digital/TemplateMockup.jsx for the keys web-bondobd, web-newsnow, web-quizbd. To re-test: login as developer@bdapps.com/dev123, go to /digital, click [data-testid=tab-web], inspect first 3 [data-testid^=template-card-web-] cards. Demo apps tested directly via /apps/bondobd, /apps/newsnow, /apps/quizbd — no auth required for those.
